data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Focuses on the time required to move to a target area.
data.technical_spec: Optimized layout with easily accessible buttons and controls.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Decision time increases with the number of choices presented.
data.technical_spec: Lean interfaces with simplified interaction paths to reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Objects placed close together are perceived as a group.
data.technical_spec: Structured layout with related content grouped together for intuitive navigation.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Items presented at the start or end of a list are remembered more vividly.
data.technical_spec: Strategically places key content at the beginning and end of lists.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users prefer your site to work the same way as all the other sites they already know.
data.technical_spec: Adopts universally familiar navigation patterns and interface elements.
